headline: These 4 High-Yield ETFs Promise Big Payouts, but Only 1 Looks Truly Safe
summary: Global X SuperDividend ETF (NYSEARCA: SDIV), Invesco KBW High Dividend Yield Financial ETF (NASDAQ: KBWD), YieldMax TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA: TSLY), and YieldMax NVDA Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA: NVDY) each promise outsized income, but the sources and sustainability of those payouts vary enormously. Let’s take a look. Global X SuperDividend: Wide Net, ... These 4 High-Yield ETFs Promise Big Payouts, but Only 1 Looks Truly Safe
